name: Churu Bites Dog Treats – Chicken Recipe Wraps (Chicken with Tuna Recipe)
shortDescription: Soft dual-texture dog treats with chicken and tuna. Grain-free, high-moisture, low-calorie, perfect for training, rewards, or picky dogs.
description: Churu Bites Dog Treats – Chicken Recipe Wrapped with Chicken & Tuna Recipe are soft, pillow-shaped treats designed to delight even the pickiest pups. Each bite combines a soft baked chicken paste exterior with a creamy Churu-style chicken and tuna filling , providing two irresistible textures in every mouthful. Crafted with high-quality, wholesome ingredients , including farm-raised chicken and natural wild-caught tuna, these treats are grain-free and contain no preservatives, carrageenan, or artificial colours . With 72% moisture content , they help maintain hydration and are gentle on the digestive system. Ideal for training, rewarding, or pill administration , Churu Bites are suitable for puppies, adult dogs, and seniors. Each individually portioned tube keeps treats fresh, makes on-the-go feeding convenient, and prevents messes. At approximately 16 kcal per pack , they’re a low-calorie treat you can feel good about giving daily. Enriched with Vitamin E for immune support and Green Tea Extract for antioxidant benefits, these soft, savory treats deliver both taste and nutrition in every bite. Key Benefits Dual-texture treat: soft chicken exterior with creamy chicken & tuna center Made with wholesome, high-quality ingredients Grain-free, free from preservatives, carrageenan, and artificial colors 72% moisture content supports hydration Low-calorie treat (~16 kcal per pack) Vitamin E supports the immune system Green Tea Extract provides antioxidant benefits Perfect for training, rewards, or hiding medication Feeding Instructions Feed as a treat only. Not intended to replace a meal. Always provide clean, fresh water. Consult your veterinarian regularly for your pet’s health. Storage Instructions Refrigerate after opening and serve as soon as possible. Ingredients Chicken, Water, Tuna, Tapioca Starch, Egg White, Sodium Caseinate, Guar Gum, Natural Chicken Flavor, Yeast Extract, Vitamin E Supplement, Paprika Oleoresin (Color), Green Tea Extract. Guaranteed Analysis Crude Protein (min): 22.00% Crude Fat (min): 3.00% Crude Fiber (max): 0.50% Moisture (max): 72.00% Vitamin E (min): 80 IU/kg Calorie Content 1300 kcal/kg 15.6 kcal per pack (ME) Net Weight 3.36 oz (0.42 oz × 8 tubes)
